pain_points.text: Monitor and analyze log data, network traffic, and/or alerts generated by a variety of security technologies in real-time.
pain_points.jd_anchor: Monitor and analyze log data, network traffic, and/or alerts generated by a variety of security technologies in real-time
pain_points.stakes: Effective real-time monitoring is critical to detect and respond to security incidents promptly, protecting client infrastructure and data.

pain_points.text: Respond, triage, and escalate security incidents using a SIEM platform following documented procedures.
pain_points.jd_anchor: Respond, triage, and escalate security incidents using a SIEM platform following documented procedures
pain_points.stakes: Proper incident response and escalation ensures timely mitigation of threats and minimizes potential damage.

pain_points.text: Support the execution of vulnerability scans and assist in analyzing results for remediation recommendations.
pain_points.jd_anchor: Support the execution of vulnerability scans and assist in analyzing results for remediation recommendations
pain_points.stakes: Accurate vulnerability scan support and analysis helps prioritize remediation efforts and reduce attack surface.

pain_points.text: Draft security incident reports detailing the threat, its characteristics, and required remediation activities for review by a senior analyst.
pain_points.jd_anchor: Draft security incident reports detailing the threat, its characteristics, and required remediation activities
pain_points.stakes: Clear and actionable incident reporting enables informed decision-making and effective communication with stakeholders.

pain_points.text: Communicate security issues to customers, both verbally and written.
pain_points.jd_anchor: Articulate security issues to customers, both verbally and written
pain_points.stakes: Effective communication ensures that technical security issues are understood by non-technical stakeholders, facilitating appropriate responses.

candidate_evidence.summary: Performed onsite network traffic analysis with Wireshark to identify anomalies, support troubleshooting, and strengthen secure network operations.

Designed security-focused automation workflows for vulnerability discovery and remediation tracking, using structured logs, alerting, and approval gates to improve visibility across automated systems.
Built security monitoring and approval-gate workflows to detect automation failures, flag risky actions, and route remediation steps through human review.
Deployed Graylog stack with log forwarding and alert conditions for Linux sudo/auth activity and Windows failed-logon attempts.
Configured alert conditions and log forwarding in Graylog for security event monitoring, supporting incident detection and escalation.
Designed approval queues and audit logs for human-in-the-loop review of risky agent actions, supporting safe escalation workflows.
Helped build a SAST reporting workflow that ingested findings from GitLab repositories and converted raw scanner output into clean reports with severity breakdowns and team views.
Correlated vulnerability details such as severity and logging dates to improve visibility into remediation priorities.
Translated technical vulnerability findings into actionable reporting for decision-makers.
Produced management-ready Excel reports with visual summaries and severity breakdowns from raw SAST data.
Presented migration risks, security considerations, and rollout recommendations to technical and non-technical stakeholders, helping leadership understand potential vulnerabilities.
Translated technical vulnerability findings into actionable reporting for decision-makers.
